name: same_army_unit_location_reference_vs_unit_number_s
description: Same Army unit, location reference vs unit number, single thread
expected_output: Single client entity: 51 Sub Area Tezpur. Task: Delivery to Tezpur unit tomorrow.
pass_criteria: PASS: Single client entity. FAIL: 'Tezpur unit' and '51 Sub Area Tezpur' treated as separate clients.
challenge: Location-based reference ('Tezpur unit') vs formal unit name ('51 Sub Area Tezpur') in same thread.
notes: Validate with Ashish — are location-based references common?
